notes: Captured post fuel system Phase 2 integration. CAR_MASS_DRY=768 + 100kg fuel = 868 kg live mass. The +100kg vs the post-turbo baseline shifts everything: 0-100 2.83 → 3.38s, DRS 200-300 4.93 → 6.48s, stop distances grow ~7-8%, lat-g drops ~3% under full corner load. All shifts are physically correct for a heavier car. FIA fuel-flow cap (3000 MJ/h) bites at high RPM in DRS 200-300 — partial cause of the 6.48s.
